_comment: GroundZeroOS — copy to project root as groundzero.config.json. Secrets go in .env (see .env.example).
_vault_root_comment: Set vault_root here OR use GROUNDZERO_VAULT_ROOT in .env (recommended)

llm._comment: OpenRouter model ID — change to any model at https://openrouter.ai/models
llm._api_key: set OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var — or set api_key here (not recommended for shared repos)

notify._whatsapp_comment: uncomment to enable WhatsApp notifications on every action

_linear_comment: uncomment to enable Linear integration (import + uplink)
